nasb.text: When there were no depths I was brought forth, When there were no springs abounding with water.

esv.text: When there were no depths I was brought forth, when there were no springs abounding with water.

cnv.text: 沒有深淵，沒有大水的泉源以先， 我已經出生。

ccb.text: 没有深渊， 没有涌流的水泉以前， 我已经诞生。

csbs.text: 在没有深渊、 没有涌流众水的泉源之时， 我已经诞生。
